challenge.explanation:
Da biste dobili tačan odgovor, razmislite o glavnom razlogu zašto je Sofi izabrala SafeGuard.

On kaže security is our top priority, što znači da je bezbednost najvažniji faktor u njegovoj odluci. Takođe navodi da SafeGuard ima stronger encryption and better protection against vulnerabilities.

Pronađi opciju koja odgovara ovoj logici.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje se nalazi ispod.

questions.text:
Sophie poslala je e-mail svom timu o izboru SafeGuard-a za njihov projekat:

Hi team,

After talking with Jake, I've decided to go with SafeGuard. While SecureSoft is more user-friendly and has a nicer interface, security is our top priority. SafeGuard has stronger encryption and better protection against vulnerabilities, so it's the safer choice.

SafeGuard is also slightly faster because of its more efficient processing. SecureSoft can be a bit sluggish with large data. The only downside is that SecureSoft has more integration options, while SafeGuard may require extra work to connect with other tools.

Thanks for your input! Let me know if you have any concerns. It's no problem if we need to discuss this more.

Yours,

Sophie

Zašto je Sofija izabrala SafeGuard?

answers.feedback: Sophie kaže da SecureSoft ima bolji interfejs, ali to nije njen glavni prioritet.
Sophie kaže da SecureSoft ima više opcija konekcije, ali SafeGuard je bolji za drugu karakteristiku.
Sophie nije spomenula cenu kao razlog u svojoj odluci.

challenge.title: Vežba 51
